Shipping Countries – Fuji Card Shop

# Shipping Countries

Fuji Card Shop ships Japanese Trading Card Games worldwide.
Below is a full list of all countries and regions we currently ship to.
Shipping rates vary by destination — you can see the exact shipping cost at checkout.


🇯🇵

**Please note: We do not ship or sell to addresses within Japan.**
Due to our current tax and operational policies, we are unfortunately unable to process orders
to Japanese addresses. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience.


📦

**We are continuously expanding our shipping destinations!**
Adding a new country requires us to research and properly handle local tax regulations,
customs requirements, and compliance obligations for that destination.
This process takes time to get right, but we want to make sure every order
reaches you smoothly and without unexpected issues at customs.
We appreciate your patience as we work to reach more countries!


✈️ 42 Countries & Regions

and growing

🔍

🌍 Europe

28 countries

🇦🇱Albania🇦🇹Austria🇧🇪Belgium🇭🇷Croatia🇨🇾Cyprus🇨🇿Czech Republic🇩🇰Denmark🇪🇪Estonia🇫🇮Finland🇫🇷France🇩🇪Germany🇭🇺Hungary🇮🇪Ireland🇮🇹Italy🇱🇻Latvia🇱🇺Luxembourg🇲🇹Malta🇳🇱Netherlands🇳🇴Norway🇵🇱Poland🇵🇹Portugal🇷🇴Romania🇸🇰Slovakia🇸🇮Slovenia🇪🇸Spain🇸🇪Sweden🇨🇭Switzerland🇬🇧United Kingdom

🌏 Asia

5 countries

🇧🇳Brunei🇭🇰Hong Kong🇸🇬Singapore🇰🇷South Korea🇹🇼Taiwan

🌊 Oceania

3 countries

🇦🇺Australia🇳🇨New Caledonia🇳🇿New Zealand

🌎 Americas

4 countries

🇨🇦Canada🇬🇺Guam🇵🇷Puerto Rico🇺🇸United States

🕌 Middle East

2 countries

🇸🇦Saudi Arabia🇦🇪United Arab Emirates

No matching countries found.

### 🚀 Expanding to More Countries

We are actively working to ship to more destinations around the world.
Each new country requires careful research into local import duties, VAT/GST registration,
customs documentation, and tax compliance to ensure a smooth delivery experience.
This takes time to set up properly, but we are committed to doing it right.


Shipping availability is subject to change without notice. Shipping rates and delivery times vary by destination.
For questions about your order or shipping, please visit our [Contact page](https://www.fujicardshop.com/contact/).
